subject: A glowing water-type energy orb — a smooth blue sphere with a water droplet symbol, radiating white light against a fragmented blue and teal crystal background.
description: The card depicts a luminous blue energy sphere bearing a water droplet symbol at its center. The orb emits a bright white radial glow and is set against a fractured, crystalline background in deep blue and teal tones. The composition is centered and symmetrical, evoking purity and elemental power. The art style is clean digital illustration with a strong specular highlight on the sphere.
foreground: glowing blue energy orb with water droplet symbol, bright white central highlight
background: fractured crystalline planes in deep blue and teal
